scripts.setup: if ! command -v bun >/dev/null; then echo 'bun is required (https://bun.sh)'; exit 1; fi; if ! command -v ollama >/dev/null; then echo 'Ollama is required (https://ollama.com/download)'; exit 1; fi; ollama pull ${LLM_MODEL:-qwen3:4b} && bun install
scripts.run: export LLM_BASE_URL=${LLM_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1}; export LLM_MODEL=${LLM_MODEL:-qwen3:4b}; OLLAMA_HEALTH_URL="$(printf '%s' "$LLM_BASE_URL" | sed 's#/v1$##')/api/tags"; if ! command -v bun >/dev/null; then echo 'bun is required (https://bun.sh)'; exit 1; fi; if ! command -v ollama >/dev/null; then echo 'Ollama is required (https://ollama.com/download)'; exit 1; fi; if ! curl -fsS "$OLLAMA_HEALTH_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Starting Ollama server...'; ollama serve >/tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; fi; if ! curl -fsS "$OLLAMA_HEALTH_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Waiting for Ollama to start...'; for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -fsS "$OLLAMA_HEALTH_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 1; done; fi; bun install; ollama pull "$LLM_MODEL"; if [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/next ]; then bun run dev; else bunx --bun next dev; fi
